summary: Backend Stage 2 API testing completed - 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend testing completed - key UI elements working except Export PDF button not rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: EXPORT AS PDF button not rendering for completed procedures. The canExportPDF() function should return true for status='completed' but the button is missing from the bottom bar. Only 'Dashboard' button appears.

action_items: Fix Export PDF button not rendering in completed procedure detail view - check bottomBar conditional rendering at line 549-568 in [id].tsx
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Stage 2 workflow fully functional: submit surgical → dual approval → submit prosthetic → dual approval → completed status
All 4 checklist sections (pre_surgical, surgical, second_stage, prosthetic_phase) correctly displayed in procedure detail
Status colors and labels properly implemented for all new statuses
Treatment Complete banner displayed correctly for completed procedures
pdfGenerator.ts correctly includes Stage 2 data for PDF export
seed_data_creation: Test procedure created and taken through full Stage 2 workflow, then cleaned up. Existing completed procedure ID: 69a06378781deba32c41edb7 used for GET tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Stage 2 workflow fully tested and working. Frontend Export PDF button has rendering issue - investigate why canExportPDF() condition evaluation or conditional rendering fails in web mode. The completed procedure 69a06378781deba32c41edb7 has status='completed' but Export PDF button not visible in bottomBar.

tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/surgica: PASS - Submits Stage 2 Surgical Protocol, requires status='phase2_approved'
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthe: PASS - Submits Stage 2 Prosthetic Protocol, requires status='stage2_surgical_approved'
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/surgica: PASS - Dual approval by supervisor + implant_incharge
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthe: PASS - Dual approval leads to status='completed'
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures?status=pending: PASS - Returns all pending stages including pending_stage2_surgical and pending_stage2_prosthetic

frontend_test_results.my_procedures_list: PASS - Shows all procedures with status labels
frontend_test_results.status_labels_colors: PASS - Treatment Complete (green), Phase 1: Pending Approval (orange), Stage 1 Implant Placement Done (blue)
frontend_test_results.export_pdf_button: FAIL - Button not rendering in bottomBar despite canExportPDF() should return true
